hooks.prompt: If there are uncommitted changes: review the diff. If all files belong, stage them by name and commit with a descriptive message using: git -c user.name='Claude (Opus)' -c user.email='noreply@anthropic.com' -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -m 'message'. If any files look out of place (build artifacts, generated files, unrelated changes), abort and explain which files are problematic.
